mapper.sql: id, public_id, code, name, status, plan, primary_locale, primary_timezone, contact_json, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tnt_tenant ( public_id, code, name, status, plan, primary_locale, primary_timezone, contact_json, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{publicId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{plan}, #{primaryLocale}, #{primaryTimezone}, CAST(#{contactJson} AS jsonb), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tnt_tenant SET name = #{name}, status = #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, plan = #{plan}, primary_locale = #{primaryLocale}, primary_timezone = #{primaryTimezone}, contact_json = CAST(#{contactJson} AS jsonb), deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tnt_tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM tnt_tenant WHERE LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM tnt_tenant WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tnt_tenant WHERE LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.sql:
WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND LOWER(code) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%'))
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tnt_tenant
ORDER BY id DESC OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{limit}
